requirements_met.evidence: HERMES_TPS_MAX_SESSIONS parsing and max-count pruning implemented; test_max_sessions_prunes_oldest_and_preserves_current verifies bound enforcement.
HERMES_TPS_SESSION_TTL_SECONDS parsing and monotonic last-update pruning implemented; test_session_ttl_prunes_stale_without_real_sleep verifies stale removal without sleeps.
Default diagnostics report disabled; full suite passes with no env vars; test_default_retention_disabled_preserves_unbounded_behavior verifies unbounded default.
get_tps_stats still returns the existing zero-value structure; tests verify reads do not create missing/pruned sessions.

Implementation uses stdlib env/time helpers only; forbidden marker inspection found no external deps, background threads, schedulers, REST/WebSocket/Prometheus servers, or SQLite persistence additions.
get_observability_contract includes additive retention metadata with env names, enabled flags, numeric limits, and opportunistic in-memory scope.
Retention diagnostics contain no session IDs, model/provider values, salts, secret material, hashes, or per-session listings; contract privacy test asserts raw session id is absent.
test_concurrent_pruning_readers_and_writers_no_crash exercises concurrent reads/writes while max-session pruning is active.

blast_radius_covered.bv_robot_impact: low risk; no related bead file touches reported
